2604.18521.title: IDOBE: Infectious Disease Outbreak forecasting Benchmark Ecosystem
2604.18521.paper_summary: Epidemic forecasting has become an integral part of real-time infectious disease outbreak response. While collaborative ensembles composed of statistical and machine learning models have become the norm for real-time forecasting, standardized benchmark datasets for evaluating such methods are lacking. Further, there is limited understanding on performance of these methods for novel outbreaks with limited historical data. In this paper, we propose IDOBE, a curated collection of epidemiological time series focused on outbreak forecasting. IDOBE compiles from multiple data repositories spanning over a century of surveillance and across U.S. states and global locations. We perform derivative-based segmentation to generate over 10,000 outbreaks covering multiple outcomes such as cases and hospitalizations for 13 diseases. We consider a variety of information-theoretic and distributional measures to quantify the epidemiological diversity of the dataset. Finally, we perform multi-horizon short-term forecasting (1- to 4-week-ahead) through the progression of the outbreak using 11 baseline models and report on their performance. In addition to standard metrics such as NMSE and MAPE for point forecasts, we include probabilistic scoring rules such as Normalized Weighted Interval Score (NWIS) to quantify the performance. We find that MLP-based methods have the most robust performance, with statistical methods having a slight edge during the pre-peak phase. IDOBE dataset along with baselines are released publicly on https://github.com/NSSAC/IDOBE to enable standardized, reproducible benchmarking of outbreak forecasting methods.
2604.18521.paper_summary_zh: 流行病預測已成為即時傳染病疫情應對的重要組成部分。雖然由統計和機器學習模型組成的協作集成已成為即時預測的常態，但缺乏用於評估這些方法的標準基準數據集。此外，對於具有有限歷史數據的新型疫情，這些方法的性能了解有限。在本文中，我們提出了IDOBE，一個專注於疫情預測的流行病學時間序列的精選集合。IDOBE匯編了來自多個數據庫的數據，涵蓋了超過一個世紀的監測數據，並跨越美國各州和全球地點。我們進行基於導數的分段，以生成超過10,000個疫情，涵蓋13種疾病的多種結果，如病例和住院人數。我們考慮了各種信息理論和分佈測量來量化數據集的流行病學多樣性。最後，我們通過11個基線模型對疫情的進展進行多地平線短期預測（1到4周前）並報告其性能。除了標準指標如點預測的NMSE和MAPE外，我們還包括了如標準化加權區間得分（NWIS）等概率評分規則來量化性能。我們發現基於MLP的方法具有最穩健的性能，而統計方法在疫情高峰前階段略有優勢。IDOBE數據集及其基線已在https://github.com/NSSAC/IDOBE上公開發布，以促進疫情預測方法的標準化、可重複基準測試。
2604.18521.author: Aniruddha Adiga et.al.
2604.18521.authors: Aniruddha Adiga, Jingyuan Chou, Anshul Chiranth, Bryan Lewis, Ana I. Bento, Shaun Truelove, Geoffrey Fox, Madhav Marathe, Harry Hochheiser, Srini Venkatramanan
